description: Skill Anomaly capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, behavior profiles, anomaly detection dry-runs, NeedsApproval plans, audit hook / Trust mutation plans, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose skill behavior profiles, anomaly scoring, NeedsApproval planning, audit hook / Trust mutation planning, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep skill anomaly method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/skill-anomaly only when the Skill Anomaly pack is installed and enabled.
